content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于7月29日 20:35 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯*50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年8月12日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
● 优化了活动唤醒复刻「三相衡生」与「因果苗圃」切换唤醒体和命轮的交互体验，现在会保留上一次选择的唤醒体或命轮选项。
● 优化了限时纪行活动「葬骸纪行」界面的任务展示，现在默认展示 4 行有余，提示守密人可以继续滑动查看。
● 修复了唤醒体「旺达」的技能「迷途之守」触发跃迁效果时，会对额外施加 1 次力量降低效果的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「弥利亚姆」灵塑适性的触腕伤害获取增幅效果错误地在「忘却篇」生效的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「希莱斯特」灵知觉醒「庇佑之力」出现错误字符的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「法洛思」启灵2「凝固鲸油」描述错误的问题。
● 修复了「完美的符印」和「受损的符印」可能被同时获取的问题。
● 修复了怪物「腐潮之傀」施加的反击状态未正确生效的问题。
● 修复了相位对弈中「凯刻斯」的技能描述中标点使用错误的问题。
● 修复了相位对弈中「珊」的技能「无尽的雕琢」的弃置效果文本描述错误地享受了护盾加成的问题。
● 修复了限时玩法「噬灵之飨」中造物「骸骨杯盏」计数可能突破 10 导致造物失效的问题。
● 修复了「暗潮虫鸣·限时预购」界面卡住的问题。
● 修复了俄语中唤醒体「弥利亚姆」「旺达」技能未翻译的问题。
● 修复了使用校友的唤醒体助战时，未显示幻衣的问题。
● 修复了「物资-命轮分解」分解确认界面文本重叠的问题。
● 修复了「生涯成就」中「暴食回响Ⅳ」无法完成的问题。
● 修复了「守密人档案」中助战唤醒体存在异常白边的问题。
● 修复了调查行动「餍飨」中文本错误的问题。
● 优化了语言设置为英语时的以下文本表述问题：
    ○ 修复了唤醒体旺达的灵塑适性升级至2级和以后时界面异常的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体图鲁、戈利亚、希莱斯特、弥利亚姆部分技能描述中触腕伤害相关文本显示异常的问题。
    ○ 修复了弥利亚姆复刻活动界面、弥利亚姆、泰旖丝、旺达试玩界面&卡池界面、葬骸纪行界面中人工翻译未能正确显示的问题。
    ○ 补充了7月28日更新中未能成功推送的唤醒体拉蒙娜，图鲁，泰旖丝，旺达语音台词翻译优化和档案馆全部角色档案翻译优化。
    ○ 优化了唤醒体奥吉尔、萝坦、朵尔的全部语音台词翻译，修复了唤醒体血链：希洛的超限爆发台词翻译错误问题。
    ○ 优化了主线序章~第三章、弥利亚姆异梦故事及相关探索事件、调查行动「餍飨」中部分文本的措辞问题。
    ○ 修复了部分怪物名措辞翻译不统一的问题。

**V2.3.0.3 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on July 29 at 20:35. You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on August 12, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailbox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
● Improved the interaction experience when switching Awakeners and Wheels of Destiny in the Rerun events "Triune Verdant" and "Sylvan Omen," now retaining the previously selected Awakener or Wheel of Destiny option. 
● Optimized the task display on the limited-time Journey event "Necrovia Archives" interface, now defaulting to show 4 rows or more, with a hint for the Keeper to continue swiping to view. 
● Fixed an issue where Awakener "Wanda"'s Skill "Keeper of the Lost" would apply an additional STR▼ effect when triggering the Leap effect. 
● Fixed an issue where Awakener "Miryam"'s Soulforge Aptitude's Tentacle DMG increase effect incorrectly applied in "Faded Legacy." 
● Fixed an issue where Awakener "Celeste"'s Rouse "Power of Blessing" displayed incorrect characters. 
● Fixed a description error in Awakener "Faros"'s Enlighten 2 "Congealed Ambergris." 
● Fixed an issue where "Perfect Sigil" and "Damaged Sigil" could potentially be obtained simultaneously. 
● Fixed an issue where the Counter state applied by Monster "Puppet of Putrescence" was not correctly taking effect. 
● Fixed a punctuation error in "Caecus"'s Skill description in Traphase. 
● Fixed a text description error in "Sanga"'s Skill "Endless Refinement," where the discard effect incorrectly benefited from Shield bonuses.

● Fixed an issue where the count of Relic "Bone Chalice" in the limited-time mode "Soulfeast" could exceed 10, causing the Relic to become ineffective. 
● Fixed an issue where the interface for "Songs of the Insectoids · Limited Pre-Order" would freeze. 
● Fixed untranslated skill descriptions for Awakeners "Miryam" and "Wanda" in Russian. 
● Fixed an issue where Phantom Attire would not display when using an alumnus's Awakener in co-op battles. 
● Fixed overlapping text in the confirmation interface for decomposing Wheel of Destiny under "Supplies". 
● Fixed an issue where the "Gluttony Echo Ⅳ" objective in "Career Achievements" could not be completed. 
● Fixed abnormal white borders on co-op Awakeners in "Keeper's Archives". 
● Fixed text errors in the Investigation "Ossuary Gala".

● Localization Fixes and Improvements (English Language Setting):
    ○We fixed an issue where Awakener Wanda's Soulforge Aptitude interface displayed abnormally when upgrading to level 2 and beyond.
    ○ The "Tentacle DMG" rich text tag in the skill descriptions of Awakener Tulu, Goliath, Celeste, and Miryam was corrected as it was previously displayed incorrectly.
    ○ Manual translations are now correctly displayed in the Miryam rerun event interface, Miryam, Thais, and Wanda trial stages and gacha interfaces, and the Necrovia Archives interface.
    ○ We've added voice line translation optimizations for Awakeners Ramona, Tulu, Thais, and Wanda, along with full character profile translation optimizations in the Archive. These were unfortunately missed in the July 28 update, but are now live.
    ○ All voice line translations for Awakeners Ogier, Lotan, and Doll have been optimized. We also fixed the translation error in the Over-Exaltation voice line for Awakener Helot: Catena.
    ○ Wording issues in the main story (Prologue through Chapter 3), Miryam's Dream Story, related Exploration Events, and Main Story chapter "Ossuary Gala" have been improved. We will continuously improve these story texts.
    ○ We fixed inconsistent translation of certain Monster names.
绷，「暗潮虫鸣·限时预购」早结束几个月了怎么还有BUG
